text:
Other: IV Medications (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving IV medications. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
599 VASOACTV_ADMSN_CD VASOACTV_ADMSN_CD Other: IV - Vasoactive medications (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving IV vasoactive medications. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
600 VASOACTV_DSCHRG_CD VASOACTV_DSCHRG_CD Other: IV -
